Health Education and Communication Tools 
May 15, 2024 
At a glance 
Health education and communication resources for refugee, immigrant, and migrant communities available in multiple languages.
Hepatitis B 
A series of fact sheets and other patient education resources on hepatitis B. Materials are available in several languages.
Maternal Health 
Download, print, or order posters, handouts, and palm cards . These resources were designed to raise awareness of symptoms that could be a sign of a life-threatening condition during and after pregnancy. Use these materials to engage and encourage conversations about pregnancy-related concerns. The Urgent Maternal Warning Signs poster is available in
